pages.title: Days Drift By
pages.tagline: Drift through liquid time in this ethereal journey.

pages.body: Welcome to the sound of moments dissolving like mist over a quiet river. This track weaves gritty noir aesthetics with dreamy liberation, creating an immersive rainforest-adjacent soundscape where every heartbeat moves slow beneath leaves above and water below. Soft whispers guide you through urgent tenderness before transcending into release. Here, time disappears without a trace as clouds melt into gray only to find the sun again. Breathe tonight while everything feels utterly alive, floating up higher through shimmering guitar textures and evolving ambient pads. It is an invitation to accept passing time with melancholy grace.
pages.styleSentence: A liquid drum and bass track at a moderate tempo featuring shimmering guitar textures, evolving ambient pads, and melodic synth leads that create an immersive, rainforest-adjacent soundscape.

pages.text:
[Intro]

Morning light...
Take me there...
Take me there...

(instrumental)

[Verse 1]

Leaves above, the river below
Every little heartbeat moving slow
Hands in the breeze
Nothing to chase
Time disappears without a trace

[Pre-Chorus]

Hold me
Don't let go
Where we wander
Flowers grow

[Chorus]

Days drift by
We don't have to know why
Breathe tonight
Everything feels alive

Days drift by
Floating into the sky
Stay with me
Stay with me
Stay...

(Liquid DnB instrumental with melodic lead and guitar textures)

[Verse 2]

Clouds roll in
Then fade away
Every color melts into gray
Then the sun
Finds its way
Just like it always does

[Bridge]

Closer...
Closer...
Into the light...

Higher...
Higher...
Through the leaves...

(Long instrumental featuring evolving pads, liquid breaks, melodic synth lead, and shimmering guitar)

[Final Chorus]

Days drift by
We don't have to know why
Breathe tonight
Everything feels alive

Days drift by
Floating into the sky
Stay with me
Stay with me

Days drift by...
Days drift by...
Days drift by...

(Fade into rainforest ambience and distant vocal echoes.)

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Whispers soft melodies into the mist.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Echoes distant calls across the canopy.

members.name: KEYS
members.bio: Plays crisp notes in the gloom.
